reviews.title: Very disappointing
reviews.text: We booked one night after reading good reviews, unfortunately our experience was not good at all. We received a very friendly greeting. The grounds and lobby are nice. We were early but told if we wanted an early check in we had to pay a fee so we waited. We were eventually allowed into our room 2.30pm!. The check in is extremely lengthy. In the lobby outside our room there was piles of dirty linen, cleaning materials etc ( see photos). Not very professional. The rooms are small with a rock hard bed. There is no privacy here as the window has no blinds and people are using the walkway outside the window all the time. You only get privacy if you close the curtains! The pool looked very grubby and unappealing.   Our shower had a dead cockroach in it. Breakfast was OK. Enough choice. I would not recommend staying here.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The building has a nice design. The location is close to the beach if that’s what you like.
reviews.negatives: The design of the building makes it so no one can use their windows because 80% of them face each other or the main walkways. The cute seating by the window is useless unless you want everyone starring at you. We found ourselves avoiding the manager as he was very pushy about what our plans were, I’m assuming they try to get you to book tours from them. We just wanted to relax, I have generally great experiences with Vietnamese hospitality but this just didn’t feel it was coming from a good place. The breakfast was sub par, food and coffee were always cold. We booked this place due to the 24/7 check in as we were arriving very late but when we got in there was no one at the desk. When we finally got to check in our room was also not what we booked and they never did anything about it.

The location is a little far from the old town, a 10 mins drive.

reviews.title: Family experience
reviews.text: The room price of 530k/night seems reasonable for this hotel. However, the facilities need to be upgraded and replaced. The bedding and towels are quite old and have a smell, the air conditioner is not cool, the TV is broken, the Wi-Fi network is weak, and the pool is small. Breakfast is okay, but due to the low price, there are many low-quality Western guests, who are quite messy, mostly backpackers staying here. Anyone traveling to Hoi An who needs a low-cost hotel should choose this one.

reviews.title: Functionally Okay
reviews.positives: Good location but not that quiet during the day since its located in front of a main road and next door is another hotel under construction. However, its quiet at night. Facility wise is ok - small gym, small pool. Room was okay
reviews.negatives: The hotel felt a little old. Some renovation would be good like the bathroom glassdoor was obviously not so well maintained but those are minor. Overall, the stay was okay.

reviews.text:
please add soundproofing - could hear every single ding of the elevator, every conversation in halls or other rooms beside. Had some event with 50 kids when we were there, starting at 6am shouting and cheering, kids running and screaming in the halls. 
please fix basic things like curtains falling apart, shower door stuck and barely closes. 
facilities overall were beautiful. staff was fantastic.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Amazing service, in a super clean and new hotel. They upgraded our room, and then moved us again to one with a view. Morning breakfast was adequate. the staff was super helpful in arranging plans and cars. Beds were very comfy. A few miles away from the hustle of hoi an ancient city, but worth it for the quiet nights. This city and the people are fantastic.
reviews.negatives: A bit removed wasnt all bad but it did make it so when we left for the day we chose to stay out for a long time. But with the dollar conversion, our 4km taxi was only about $3-4

reviews.title: Light review
reviews.text:
Praise: The room is clean, has a full swimming pool, breakfast buffet, enthusiastic staff, basically the hotel meets the requirements of a 3-star hotel.  
Criticism: The swimming pool is small, the pool is shallow, the soundproofing of the room is not good, booked a river view room but saw nothing, the river view rooms are not very attractive, the price is a bit high, the room is small less than 35m2, far from the center so getting to the old town is quite far, the buffet is not diverse.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Vân,

Cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những nhận xét chi tiết về kỳ nghỉ tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết bạn hài lòng với phòng sạch sẽ, hồ bơi, buffet sáng và đội ngũ nhân viên nhiệt tình.

Chúng tôi xin ghi nhận những góp ý của bạn về hồ bơi, phòng cách âm, cũng như các phòng có view không đạt yêu cầu. Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét và cải thiện những vấn đề này để nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Về khoảng cách từ khách sạn đến phố cổ, chúng tôi hiểu rằng có thể gây bất tiện cho một số khách hàng, nhưng rất vui khi biết bạn vẫn tận hưởng được kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội đón tiếp bạn lần nữa và mang đến một trải nghiệm tốt hơn.

Trân trọng,

reviews.title: Peaceful days
reviews.text:
We really enjoyed our stay. The breakfast was delicious, the staff attentive and friendly, and our room was cozy with a lovely view. The air conditioning worked well, and the bed was comfortable. Housekeeping was very attentive throughout our stay.
Right next to the hotel, there is a beautiful walking path through the rice fields, which we really appreciated.
Due to the nearby road, it could be a bit noisy at times. Unfortunately, not all guests respected the quiet hours (in the hallways and around the pool). The internet connection was stable, but rather slow.
Overall, we felt very much at home and would come back anytime.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: The property is as pictured, beautiful, clean, and comfortable.  I enjoyed the breakfast (lots of choices). The pool area is lovely, with plenty of seating and towels. Thanks to the whole team staff, especially Dhi, for making my stay memorable!

reviews.title: Near the beach

reviews.title: Small Hotel, Big Heart – My Happy Life in Hoi An
reviews.positives:
From the moment I arrived, Happy Life Memories Hotel truly lived up to its name. Thi at the front desk greeted me with a smile that felt like sunshine, Danh and Liem made sure I had everything I needed, and Manager Mr. Chuog shared insider tips that made my Hoi An trip unforgettable.

Perfectly located—just steps from the beach, with a spa, pool, gym, and restaurant nearby. My room was spotless, quiet, and cozy, and the smaller size of the hotel gave it a peaceful, personal vibe.

The staff here go above and beyond—don’t be shy to ask, they love helping you create special moments. I tried to extend my stay, but it was fully booked—so grab your spot early, this slice of paradise doesn’t stay empty for long!
reviews.negatives: No complaints.  I enjoyed my stay

reviews.title: Lovely hotel

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text:
Luxury on a budget, would definitely recommend. Lovely rooms, comfy beds. Nice shower. Breakfast is included and is great with lots of options. Pool is lovely and refreshing and just the aesthetic all round in this hotel is beautiful! 
They offer free bikes to make it easier for you to get around. However with the heat it’s a lot to ride the bikes to the old town, we did around 15/20 minutes on them and that was enough. Grab is cheap enough to get taxi’s/grab bikes into the old town. Overall a very enjoyable stay here. We wish there was availability for us to have extended however it was fully booked. Also if you are staying here and want to venture out for some food would highly recommend GAO Hoi an. By far the best food we had in Hoi an so far. Probably most of Vietnam!!

reviews.title: Family Hotel
reviews.positives: Our family had a fantastic stay at Elites Riverside Hotel & Spa! The staff were incredibly friendly and always smiling, from the reception to the housekeeping team. The room was upgraded to a family suite with a beautiful pool and garden view, which we truly appreciated. Breakfast was delicious with a variety of options, including fresh yogurt and sweet pastries. Highly recommend for families!

reviews.title: Good hotel, worth staying.
reviews.text: The hotel is charming, clean, with no complaints, close to Cua Dai beach. If you want to go to the city, it takes about 10 minutes to get there. I visited on a rainy day, so I just stayed around the hotel area. It's quiet, and the front desk staff as well as the security are polite and attentive, wonderful service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The service and the food were absolutely wonderful, and the location is conveniently located right by the beach.

reviews.title: A beautiful hotel I want to visit again.
reviews.text: The hotel is very Vietnamese and pretty from the entrance. The check-in felt like being treated while comfortably sitting on a sofa and enjoying welcome juice. They also provided several vouchers. The best voucher was for free entry to the Silk Beach Club. They lent us bicycles for free, allowing us to go to the Silk Beach Club to swim in the pool and the sea. I was quite envious of the foreigners riding bicycles, but it was a fun experience. The room is cozy but a bit small. It doesn't seem to be 30 square meters. The bathroom door is a sliding one, but it's not fixed at the bottom, making it rattle and noisy when opening and closing it. However, since the price is around 27,000 won including breakfast, it covers all the downsides. The decorations and interior are cute like a boutique hotel, and the structure of the hotel is beautiful. They said it has been renovated, so it's clean. I regretted only booking one night. It was my first time in the Kueh Dai area, and the surrounding environment was very pretty and quiet; I liked it more than An Bang Beach. If I go again, I will definitely stay there again.

reviews.title: Altogether it was a great place to stay

reviews.title: Overall our stay was very good
reviews.text:
Location:
The location is good, 10 minutes to the beach by walking. There are many restaurants and convenience stores within walking distance(near the beach)
Room:
The room is clean, and the bed is comfortable.
Cleanliness:
The staff cleaned the room and changed the bedsheets every day.
Breakfast:
The breakfast was good. Sometimes there was no buffet as there were not too many customers. But we enjoyed it.
Staff:
The staff was friendly and helped with all our requests. The communication was good.
TV:
There are many TV channels(including some English movie channels), but it would be much better if there were Netflix.
Gym and Pool:
We enjoyed the pool and the small Gym.
The 2nd floor didn't have good WIFI during our stay. We moved to the 1st floor, and the WIFI was not stable. All the rooms of the same type(Junior Suite) we booked are close to the road, and the window was not soundproof.
reviews.response:

Once again, thank you for staying with us and we look forward to serving you in the near future.

Best Regards

Front Office Team

reviews.title: Five Stars with love!
reviews.text:
Gorgeous hotel in a really great location.  Walk across the river to the beach, or borrow the hotel's bycicles to go exploring many hidden cafes in the rice fields or along the river, or visit the food market.  So many great things about this hotel.  Cleanest room I've ever stayed in, huge comfy king bed (I'm fussy about the bed) great swimming pool.  Breakfast was a bit hit and miss but always a stunning fruit offering of Dragan fruit pineapple watermelon passionfruit.  They will make you eggs any style so can't really complain.  Staff were super friendly the management has done a great job choosing lovely warm people.  Loved Hoi An wonderful place and friendly people!
Vietnam's star is GOLD just like their hearts 🇻🇳 ♥️

reviews.title: Hotel où on se sent bien

reviews.title: Hoi An, my home
reviews.text:
Happy Life Memories is truly a hotel I want to keep to myself~~^^  
1. The mindset of the staff is truly excellent.  
   They are above a 5-star level~~ "A guest's problem is my problem."  
   They solve issues quickly without any fuss.  
2. Every day is clean.  
   The hotel staff is always busy with gardening and pool maintenance.  
   If you bring even a little bit of luggage, they will promptly help you~~  
3. The breakfast is so fulfilling; the food changes frequently.  
   At first, I was used to big hotel breakfasts and didn't realize,  
   but after visiting various places, I realized that  
   such a meal for this accommodation price truly values the guests.  
4. Having stayed at Happy for about 15 nights, I felt  
   that I created many joyful memories during my time there.  
5. I have traveled quite a bit, so I can be picky.  
   Nevertheless, Happy gets a perfect score from me.  
   To be honest, I don’t want to share this.  
**Thank you so much, Happy staff!  
**I’ll be back suddenly, like a surprise~~~~😄^^

reviews.title: excellence in service,botanic garden vibe and architecture design
reviews.text:
I stayed in Hoian center for several nights and decided to move closer to the beach. This hotel &spa is my most smart choice during Vietnamese journey!  
Location: it is located on the road CUA Dai, along this road to the south-west will arrive the old town of Hoi An (by car 13min, around 4Km) , or same direction 1.5 Km to arrive Ba Le Market( local market with fresh fruit,eateries , juice stall every!)  if you go north-east, it is 700m to arrive Cua Dai Beach! There is big supermarket Moonmilk 250meters far with all imported food and fresh bakery. Or Win Mart on the north  ( convenient shop) 400meter far for snack or water, fruit… in the morning, there is a local market near Win Mart. 
The location is strategic is you are moving with bike/motobike. it is also convenient to grab car for going old town/ coconut forest…. 
The service: the staffs are well-trained. They are very polite and thoughtful! the breakfast buffet, check-in procedure, housekeeping swimming pool maintenance… they are all standby! (The banana flower salad is must-try in breakfast) I love all the flowers here, so I ask for permission to take some flowers to room. Then every several days, the housekeeper changed the flowers for me ! How lovely and sweet! The staffs in dinning room remember my choice of Pho, the reception / concierge staffs provides assistance once we need. There is snack and drinks ( fresh lemonade) on the side table in lobby - it is very nice! 
The room: the room I booked is enough big for two. The bathroom is big as well. There is bay-window in every room, so you can relax there for reading. And the interior design is practical and modern with Hoi A photographs. The switch is designed well! 
Well, too much to write…. In short, it is a hotel with a lot details , I would highly recommend it to everyone, and I look forward to coming back !

reviews.title: Großartiger Aufenthalt inmitten von Reisfeldern und sehr nah am Strand
reviews.positives:
Tolles Frühstück mit super großer Auswahl, frischen Eierzubereitung nach eigenem Wunsch, asiatischen und vielen europäischen Leckereien. Sehr nettes Personal. 2x täglich kostenloser Shuttle in die Altstadt oder kostenfreie Fahrradausleihe. Tolle Betten & Kissen - alles sauber. Der Beachclub ist großartig! Voucher kann man sich jederzeit bei der Rezeption abholen und Erhalt kostenfreien Einritt und hat so Pool mit Strandblick und Liegen gleich vorne im Sand inklusive. Mit dem Rad wirklich nur maximal 5 min zum Strand. Supermarkt 100m entfernt und kleinere (teure) Restaurants in der Nähe. Grab ungefähr 60-80k ins Stadtzentrum. 
Unser Geheimtipp: „the Fisherman“ vegetarisches Restaurant direkt am Strand nach ca. 20 min Radtour am Fluss entlang.
reviews.negatives: Alles war wunderbar

Einen Roller konnten wir uns für einen angemessenen Preis ausleihen und die Fahrräder konnten umsonst genutzt werden, was wirklich richtig klasse ist! Wir haben sie häufig genutzt, um in die Old Town zu fahren (ca.15 Min). Zum Strand ist es auch nicht weit (ca.10Min zu Fuß). Die Zimmer sind hübsch und sauber. Das essen war sehr lecker. Ich habe zu meinem Geburtstag sogar eine kleine Torte bekommen, was mich wirklich sehr gefreut hat und die Aufmerksam des Hotels zeigt. Weiter so!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wir haben insgesamt 4 Wochen im Elites Riverside Hotel gewohnt und gearbeitet. Die Zimmer sind sehr schön eingerichtet, komfortabel und sauber, insbesondere das Bett war sehr bequem und die Klimaanlage nahezu geräuschlos. Die WLAN Verbindung war die gesamten 4 Wochen über sehr stabil. Das Frühstück ist qualitativ sehr gut und es gibt viel Auswahl. Das Personal war unfassbar freundlich und aufmerksam. Das Hotel ist insgesamt sehr schön gestaltet und gut in Schuss gehalten, insbesondere der Poolbereich ist toll. Natürlich ist es am Pool etwas lauter, da er zur Straße ausgerichtet ist, das wussten wir aber vorher und hat uns persönlich nicht besonders gestört. Wir hatten eine wunderschöne Zeit im Elites Riverside Hotel und würden jederzeit wieder hierher kommen es

Todella mukava henkilökunta, auttavaisia ja iloisia. 

Huoneet ovat siistit ja tuoksuu ja näyttää puhtailta / hyvältä. 

Aamupala on mainio, välillä on a la carte tilaat valmiiksi ja he tuovat pöytään ruoan, aivan mahtavaa. 

Uima allas on hyvä ja penkit pehmeät siinä on hyvä ottaa aurinkoa, sopii myös lapsille sillä aurinkotuolien kohta on matala. 

Saat otettua itsellesi polkupyörän tämä on juuri sopivan matkan päässä vanhasta kaupungista ja rannalta. Suosittelen pyöräilyä, sillä ei kestä kauaa ja tiet ovat ok kuntoisia

reviews.title: Это был бы замечательный отель, если бы не стройка
reviews.text:
Наше проживание в отеле были ужасным. Нас поселили в номер с окнами прямо на соседнюю большую стройку. Они начинали сверлить, пилить, стучать в 7 утра. Сам отель тоже находится в процессе ремонта. Половина отеля в строительных лесах. Пахнет краской, строительная пыль летит на всех. Бассейн весь грязный, в строительной пыли. Номера маленькие и неуютные. Еще под окнами находится ферма с курицами. И каждое утро в 5 начинал кричать петух. Можно сказать отелю спасибо только за завтраки и обслуживание. Но если хочется тишины и покоя, то обходите этот отель стороной пока там стройка. 
Вопрос к управляющим отеля: зачем селить людей и заставлять их страдать, когда ваш отель весь в ремонте? Зачем? Никакого отдыха, никакой тишины.

reviews.title: Best price/quality ratio
reviews.text:
The hotel is located about 10–15 minutes from Cua Dai Beach and a bit farther from the Old Town, which is actually a plus—it’s peaceful, quiet, and not overcrowded. There’s no heavy traffic like in areas closer to the Old Town. Bicycles are available for free, making it easy to get around, and the Old Town itself is a pedestrian area anyway.
The hotel is clean and calm, with a nice pool and a lake just across the road. The breakfasts are excellent, with a wide variety of options, and the staff are wonderful.
I accidentally left my phone behind, but thanks to Nguyen Thi Thi, who contacted the taxi driver, I was able to return and get it back. Many thanks for the great service!

Tôi là khách thân thiết đã đặt phòng tại nhiều khách sạn qua booking nhưng chưa bao giờ nhận được sự đối sử tệ bac như khách sạn này. Tôi đặt phòng tại đây vào ngày 30 tháng 2 và ở đêm 1 tháng 3 , tôi đặt phòng một giường với 3 lựa chọn được ghi rất rõ ràng rằng có hai lựa chọn là phải trả tiền trước khi đến khách sạn tức là bị cà thẻ ngay khi đặt , còn tôi chọn phương án đắt tiền hơn nhưng sẽ được trả tiền khi đến khách sạn. Thật thất vọng vô cùng tôi vừa đặt phòng xong 3 phút đã bị cà tiền ngay lập tức khi còn 6 h nữa tôi mới mặt tại ks. Thật sự đây là một sừ gian dối lừa khách khi bầy ra tiêu chí rõ ràng , minh bạch nhưng lại làm ngược lại. Tôi còn thất vọng hơn nữa khi nhân viên phụ trách đặt phòng chối bỏ lỗi của mình , bảo chưa cà thẻ của tôi trong khi đó tôi có chứng cứ rõ ràng khách sạn đã cà tiền của tôi , đổi lỗi cho booking đã cà tiền của tôi và bảo tôi tự liên hệ với booking
 Thực ra đây chỉ là một lỗi không lớn nhưng cách hành sử của khách sạn quá tệ và không chuyên nghiệp , tôi chỉ cần đã làm sai thì phải xin lỗi tôi không yêu cầu bất kể một sự đền bù nào. Nhất định tôi sẽ không bao giờ trở lại khách sạn và khuyên mọi người thận trọng khi đặt phòng tại đây
